{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323164040B29CF159E2E8EB35E6A6"}"},"total":129},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7470006978054488857","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体来说是本不错的书[赞]，对主角万人迷身份处理的挺自然。主角应该不算脑力派吧，做事挺随性，没有将利益最大化，给自己造了些麻烦。不过这本书在斩神同人文里，五颗星还是手到擒来[爱心]。","text_exts":[{"e":20,"s":17,"text":"万人迷","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774255240EB35E6A6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227470006978054488857%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227432327030173092888%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":74,"s":70,"text":"斩神同人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774255240EB35E6A6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227470006978054488857%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227432327030173092888%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739251468,"group_id":"7432327030173092888","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"红围巾","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/l5ArMLrXqabGuWkZyHMsQ=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/611fe869051e4bfaa24a34f01591dd89~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776797104&x-signature=3T6zmBs9eSt25NTtBP96FU0pJg0%3D","user_id":"972441440752359","user_name":"人鬼幢幢行"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"972441440752359","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7432327030173092888","book_info":{"abstract":"正文完结【斩神x靠贴贴获取多个神墟禁墟技能x团宠】
阿斯蒙蒂斯是掌管色欲的神明，因为弱小，被其他神明囚之高楼。
机缘巧合之下，他观看斩神这个世界打发时间，却意外卷入空间裂隙，进入了斩神的世界。
阿斯蒙蒂斯干脆化名为了花九灯，发现了自己的特殊能力——靠贴贴复制神墟。
果断黏上林七夜，跟着他有高质量美男贴！！
【与林七夜贴贴一分钟，获取了“凡尘神域”。】
【与杨晋贴贴三十秒，获取了“清源法相”。】
【与赵空城贴贴十秒，获取了“泯生闪月”。】
【……】
贴贴越久，贴的人越强，他能获取的能力越强。
阿斯蒙蒂斯作为色欲的神明，简直是触碰到了他的舒适项，贴遍所有强者，他获取了几乎所有能力。
尽管他一开始很弱小又如何，他最后会是最强。
遇上原世界的神明，阿斯蒙蒂斯也不再掩盖锋芒！
他即是最强！
【斩神同人，可能细节有所出入，谢谢喜欢】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1cced9904537ce34f2c6a8001de1abc9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"神经病日记","author_id":"","book_id":"7432327030173092888","book_name":"斩神：不小心混成万人迷了怎么办","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2993人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7432327524413080088","read_count":"2993","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"272584"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"144","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,同人,斩神,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/206eb38b47ec3fb3c4726957d1174136~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779439240&x-signature=%2BBBqsrot1CiHudOKlagyPc6FiG8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3984229390882878","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"133"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323164040B29CF159E2E8EB35E6A6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"dig
